lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਇਸਾ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਕਾ ਰਾਇਸਾ ਜਿਤੁ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਈ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raaeisaa piaare kaa raaeisaa jit sadaa sukh hoee | rahaau |
lines.english: Savor the story, the story of the Beloved Lord, which brings a lasting peace. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਜਾਣੈ ਕਰੇ ਆਪਿ ਜਿਨਿ ਵਾੜੀ ਹੈ ਲਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aape jaanai kare aap jin vaarree hai laaee |1|
lines.english: He Himself knows, and He Himself acts; He laid out the garden of the world. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਕੰਤੁ ਨ ਰਾਵਿਆ ਸਾ ਪਛੋ ਰੇ ਤਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: jin rang kant na raaviaa saa pachho re taanee |
lines.english: She who does not enjoy the Love of her Husband Lord, shall come to regret and repent in the end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਥ ਪਛੋੜੈ ਸਿਰੁ ਧੁਣੈ ਜਬ ਰੈਣਿ ਵਿਹਾਣੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: haath pachhorrai sir dhunai jab rain vihaanee |2|
lines.english: She wrings her hands, and bangs her head, when the night of her life has passed away. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਫਿਰਿ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਰਾਵੀਐ ਜਬ ਆਵੈਗੀ ਵਾਰੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: taa fir piaaraa raaveeai jab aavaigee vaaree |3|
lines.english: She shall have the opportunity to enjoy her Beloved, only when her turn comes again. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੰਤੁ ਲੀਆ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਮੈ ਤੇ ਵਧਵੀ ਏਹ ॥
lines.translit: kant leea sohaaganee mai te vadhavee eh |
lines.english: The happy soul-bride attains her Husband Lord - she is so much better than I am.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਛੋਤਾਵਾ ਨਾ ਮਿਲੈ ਜਬ ਚੂਕੈਗੀ ਸਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: pachhotaavaa naa milai jab chookaigee saaree |
lines.english: Nothing comes from repentance, when the game is already finished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਗੁਣ ਮੁਝੈ ਨ ਆਵਨੀ ਕੈ ਜੀ ਦੋਸੁ ਧਰੇਹ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: se gun mujhai na aavanee kai jee dos dhareh |4|
lines.english: I have none of her merits or virtues; whom should I blame? ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਸਖੀ ਸਹੁ ਰਾਵਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਪੂਛਉਗੀ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jinee sakhee sahu raaviaa tin poochhaugee jaae |
lines.english: I shall go and ask those sisters who have enjoyed their Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਭਉ ਚੰਦਨੁ ਲਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: hukam pachhaanai naanakaa bhau chandan laavai |
lines.english: She who understands the Hukam of His Command, O Nanak, applies the Fear of God as her sandalwood oil;

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਇ ਲਗਉ ਬੇਨਤੀ ਕਰਉ ਲੇਉਗੀ ਪੰਥੁ ਬਤਾਏ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: paae lgau benatee krau leaugee panth bataae |5|
lines.english: I touch their feet, and ask them to show me the Path. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਦਿਲਿ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਸੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਕਹੀਐ ਰੇ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jo dil miliaa su mil rahiaa miliaa kaheeai re soee |
lines.english: She who meets her Beloved in her heart, remains united with Him; this is truly called union.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਕਾਮਣ ਕਾਮਣਿ ਕਰੈ ਤਉ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਕਉ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: gun kaaman kaaman karai tau piaare kau paavai |6|
lines.english: she charms her Beloved with her virtue, and so obtains Him. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਬਹੁਤੇਰਾ ਲੋਚੀਐ ਬਾਤੀ ਮੇਲੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: je bahuteraa locheeai baatee mel na hoee |7|
lines.english: As much as she may long for Him, she shall not meet Him through mere words. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਾਤੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਫੁਨਿ ਧਾਤੁ ਕਉ ਲਿਵ ਲਿਵੈ ਕਉ ਧਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: dhaat milai fun dhaat kau liv livai kau dhaavai |
lines.english: As metal melts into metal again, so does love melt into love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਨਾ ਵਾੜੀ ਹੋਇ ਘਰਿ ਖਰੁ ਸਾਰ ਨ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: paanaa vaarree hoe ghar khar saar na jaanai |
lines.english: There may be an orchard of betel nut trees in the garden, but the donkey does not appreciate its value.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਤਉ ਅਨਭਉ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee jaaneeai tau anbhau paavai |8|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, this understanding is obtained, and then, one obtains the Fearless Lord. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸੀਆ ਹੋਵੈ ਮੁਸਕ ਕਾ ਤਬ ਫੂਲੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: raseea hovai musak kaa tab fool pachhaanai |9|
lines.english: If someone savors a fragrance, then he can truly appreciate its flower. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਿਉ ਪੀਵੈ ਜੋ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: apiau peevai jo naanakaa bhram bhram samaavai |
lines.english: One who drinks in the ambrosia, O Nanak, abandons his doubts and wanderings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਸਹਜੇ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਹੈ ਅਮਰਾ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੧੦॥੧॥
lines.translit: sahaje sahaje mil rahai amaraa pad paavai |10|1|
lines.english: Easily and intuitively, he remains blended with the Lord, and obtains the immortal status. ||10||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀਆ ਕਥਾ ਕਹਾਣੀਆ ਗੁਰਿ ਮੀਤਿ ਸੁਣਾਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: har keea kathaa kahaaneea gur meet sunaaeea |
lines.english: The Guru, my friend, has told me the stories and the sermon of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਲੰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: tilang mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Tilang, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਗੁਰ ਆਪਣੇ ਗੁਰ ਕਉ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਈਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: balihaaree gur aapane gur kau bal jaaeea |1|
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to my Guru; to the Guru, I am a sacrifice. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਇ ਮਿਲੁ ਗੁਰਸਿਖ ਆਇ ਮਿਲੁ ਤੂ ਮੇਰੇ ਗੁਰੂ ਕੇ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aae mil gurasikh aae mil too mere guroo ke piaare | rahaau |
lines.english: Come, join with me, O Sikh of the Guru, come and join with me. You are my Guru's Beloved. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਵਦੇ ਸੇ ਗੁਰੂ ਤੇ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: har ke gun har bhaavade se guroo te paae |
lines.english: The Glorious Praises of the Lord are pleasing to the Lord; I have obtained them from the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਭਾਣਾ ਮੰਨਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਘੁਮਿ ਘੁਮਿ ਜਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jin gur kaa bhaanaa maniaa tin ghum ghum jaae |2|
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, a sacrifice to those who surrender to, and obey the Guru's Will. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਦੇਖਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: jin satigur piaaraa dekhiaa tin kau hau vaaree |
lines.english: I am dedicated and devoted to those who gaze upon the Beloved True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਕੀਤੀ ਚਾਕਰੀ ਤਿਨ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jin gur kee keetee chaakaree tin sad balihaaree |3|
lines.english: I am forever a sacrifice to those who perform service for the Guru. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਤੇਰਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਦੁਖ ਮੇਟਣਹਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: har har teraa naam hai dukh mettanahaaraa |
lines.english: Your Name, O Lord, Har, Har, is the Destroyer of sorrow.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਤੇ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: gur sevaa te paaeeai guramukh nisataaraa |4|
lines.english: Serving the Guru, it is obtained, and as Gurmukh, one is emancipated. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਦੇ ਤੇ ਜਨ ਪਰਵਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jo har naam dhiaaeide te jan paravaanaa |
lines.english: Those humble beings who meditate on the Lord's Name, are celebrated and acclaimed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਵਾਰਿਆ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਕੁਰਬਾਨਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: tin vittahu naanak vaariaa sadaa sadaa kurabaanaa |5|
lines.english: Nanak is a sacrifice to them, forever and ever a devoted sacrifice. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾ ਹਰਿ ਤੇਰੀ ਉਸਤਤਿ ਹੈ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: saa har teree usatat hai jo har prabh bhaavai |
lines.english: O Lord, that alone is Praise to You, which is pleasing to Your Will, O Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਸੇਵਦੇ ਤਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jo guramukh piaaraa sevade tin har fal paavai |6|
lines.english: Those Gurmukhs, who serve their Beloved Lord, obtain Him as their reward. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਤੀ ਪਿਰਹੜੀ ਤਿਨਾ ਜੀਅ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਨਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa har setee piraharree tinaa jeea prabh naale |
lines.english: Those who cherish love for the Lord, their souls are always with God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਜਪਿ ਜਪਿ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਜੀਵਦੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: oe jap jap piaaraa jeevade har naam samaale |7|
lines.english: Chanting and meditating on their Beloved, they live in, and gather in, the Lord's Name. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਘੁਮਿ ਜਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jin guramukh piaaraa seviaa tin kau ghum jaaeaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those Gurmukhs who serve their Beloved Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਆਪਿ ਛੁਟੇ ਪਰਵਾਰ ਸਿਉ ਸਭੁ ਜਗਤੁ ਛਡਾਇਆ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: oe aap chhutte paravaar siau sabh jagat chhaddaaeaa |8|
lines.english: They themselves are saved, along with their families, and through them, all the world is saved. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਦਸਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਪੁੰਨੁ ਵਡ ਪੁੰਨੋ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: gur har maarag dasiaa gur pun vadd puno |9|
lines.english: The Guru has shown me the Lord's Path; the Guru has done the greatest good deed. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪਿਆਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਗੁਰੁ ਧੰਨੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਧੰਨੋ ॥
lines.translit: gur piaarai har seviaa gur dhan gur dhano |
lines.english: My Beloved Guru serves the Lord. Blessed is the Guru, Blessed is the Guru.
